name: Quit Tracker: Stop Smoking

This is the perfect motivational tool for those that want to break this bad habit right now but find it hard to do so. A great motivator here is the Health tab where you can see the positive effects that quitting has on your body. Thankfully, you will also be able to track the progress and see how close you are to become smoke free.
Don’t hesitate and access the best motivator if you want to quit smoking. Download Quit Tracker immediately and take control over this unwanted habit, remove it from your life!

•	Track how close you are to a smoking-free life
•	See how much money you saved and how much life you regained

•	View quit smoking timeline that will give you a better sense of how quickly it benefits your body.

name: QuitNow: Quit smoking for good
description: Have you considered quitting smoking? Whether you’ve already quit or you’re still thinking about it, QuitNow will help you quit tobacco for good. Quitting smoking is one of the best decisions you can make for your health: it reduces your risk of disease, you regain energy, you save money, and you also protect the people around you. But the truth is, quitting smoking isn’t easy. That’s where QuitNow comes in. QuitNow was born in 2011, created by a smoker who wanted to quit. Since then, we’ve grown, brought in addiction specialists, and refined our tools so you can quit tobacco for good: 🗓️ Your ex-smoker status When you quit smoking, it’s important to clearly see what you’re achieving. That’s why on QuitNow’s home screen you’ll see how long it’s been since you last smoked, how many cigarettes you haven’t smoked, how much money you’ve saved, and how much life you’ve regained. 💬 Community: the ex-smokers chat Having a smoke-free environment is crucial when you quit. QuitNow offers a chat full of people who, like you, have said goodbye to tobacco. Sharing your journey with other ex-smokers will make your path easier. 👨‍⚕️ Live sessions with an expert Every month we host a live session with a smoking cessation expert. In these sessions, the psychologist explains the best way to quit smoking and answers attendees’ questions live. These sessions are a unique opportunity to get personalized advice and clear up doubts in real time. 👨‍🏫 A complete course to quit smoking Some people prefer a more structured approach when they quit. That’s why QuitNow includes a step-by-step course designed to guide you throughout the entire process of quitting tobacco. It works like a digital book, but integrated inside the app. 🏆 Milestones: small motivations to quit smoking As with any task in life, quitting smoking is easier when you break the challenge into smaller goals. That’s why QuitNow offers 80 milestones based on the cigarettes you’ve avoided, the days you’ve gone without smoking, and the money you’ve saved. This way, you can start celebrating your wins from day one. 🍎️ Your health as an ex-smoker In QuitNow you’ll find a list of health indicators that show how your body improves day by day. These indicators are the same ones published by the World Health Organization, and we update them as soon as the WHO does. Plus, QuitNow includes other sections designed to help you on your journey to quit smoking. 🤖 QuitNow AI Whenever questions come up during your quitting process, you can turn to QuitNow AI. It’s designed to provide clear, reliable information, based on our course and on data from the World Health Organization. 📚 Books to help you quit smoking Learning techniques and approaches to quit smoking can make the process much easier. That’s why we’ve selected well-known books that can effectively help you on your path to a tobacco-free life. ⌚ Also on your watch QuitNow’s Wear OS app and its tiles let you track your progress, see how much you’ve saved, and check your smoke-free stats right from your wrist. Because we dedicate so much time and effort to it, we firmly believe QuitNow is the best app to quit smoking. As always, there’s room for improvement, so if you have any ideas to make QuitNow even better, please write to us at android@quitnow.app. We truly hope QuitNow supports you on your journey to a tobacco-free life ❤️

name: Quit Smoking Gradually: Alive
description:
Quit smoking at your own pace. Alive helps you make it happen.

Tired of cigarettes controlling your life? Alive helps you take back control without the pressure of quitting cold turkey. With a personalized plan and a simple smoking tracker, you can gradually quit smoking, ease withdrawals, and reduce anxiety without pressure—all at your own pace. 

Unlike most quitting apps, Alive doesn’t expect you to go smoke-free on day one. Whether you’re considering quitting, struggling with it, or adjusting to life without cigarettes, Alive supports you every step of the way.

You’re in charge. Take it slow, pause anytime, and come back when you’re ready. No pressure, no guilt. And when you’re ready to stop smoking for good, Alive supports you with tracking tools, guidance, and gentle reminders—especially when things get tough.

Ready to break free? Alive has your back—every step of the way. Download now and begin your journey to a smoke-free life today!

Why Choose Alive to Quit Smoking?

Alive isn’t just about breaking free from cigarettes—it’s about celebrating every win along the way. Our cigarette quitting app helps your body gradually adapt to less nicotine, easing dependence and minimizing withdrawal, making your smoke-free journey smoother.

Here’s How Alive Helps: 

• Track Stats & Milestones: See detailed statistics on how far you've come in real time, from cigarettes avoided to money saved. Track exactly how much you’re gaining by cutting back.  

• Track Cigarette Reduction: Record your smoking patterns and reduction progress with our cigarette log and smoking tracker as you gradually work to stop smoking. 

•  Save Money: Cutting back helps your health and your wallet. Track the money you’re saving with every cigarette you choose to skip.  

• Monitor Withdrawals: Receive support through encouraging notifications and smart reminders, along with quit smoking tips to manage anxiety and stay strong through cravings as you scale down. 

How Does Alive Work?

1. Start by entering your smoking habits. 

2. Log each cigarette with the smoking tracker. Sometimes, the waiting timer will gently ask you to pause a few minutes, helping you delay urges and build discipline. 

3. Follow your personalized plan divided into weekly phases. Each phase slightly increases the time between cigarettes, allowing your body to adapt to less nicotine while you monitor withdrawals with ease. 

4. Track your progress and milestones. At the end of each week, you choose whether to advance to the next phase or stay where you are—putting you in full control to stop smoking at your own pace. 

Additionally, our Quit Smoking Savings Calculator helps you track how much money you save as you gradually stop smoking, so you feel good in your body and your bank account. 

Support After Quitting

Quitting is just the beginning. Alive stays with you every step of the way. Use the smoking tracker and cigarette log to reflect on how far you’ve come. Dive into our app for quit smoking tips, daily encouragement, and practical motivation to help you stay strong, stay smoke-free, and live the life you deserve. 

Try Alive Today  

You can try Alive for the first week, and our subscription plans thereafter are designed to fit your budget. Choose the option that works best for you—it’s an investment in your health with big rewards.

Download Alive now and start your journey to quit smoking today

Consult your doctor—this app is a helpful tool, not a medical treatment. Ultimately, the final step is yours: that last cigarette and your commitment. Remember: one step is always easier than a giant leap. 

Pricing varies by subscription plan. Check https://quitsmoking-app.com/ for details. 

Website: https://quitsmoking-app.com/

name: My QuitBuddy
developer: Department of Health and Aged Care
description:
My QuitBuddy was updated in late May 2025 to provide a new user experience and support even more people in their quitting journey.

- If you are having issues opening My QuitBuddy (e.g., seeing a blank screen), please ensure that you update to the most recent version. 
- If you are unable to proceed through the app, please check your text size settings, as some people are having issues when using larger text sizes.
- If you are experiencing issues with your quit date and/or quit progress tracking, please select ‘Already Started’ when the app asks when you quit. Then enter your original quit date (and other details like costs) so the app can calculate how long it has been since you quit, and your progress.  
- If you have already selected a different quit date, re-install the app so you can fill out your original details. Please note that reinstalling the app will delete any stored data such as journal entries or motivations. For privacy purposes, My QuitBuddy is not able to adjust or recover lost data. 

For further support, please contact quitnow@health.gov.au

----

Whether you’re thinking about quitting, working up to your quit date or ready to quit now, My QuitBuddy can be customised to suit whatever stage you’re at on your quit journey and help you stay smoke-free and vape-free.

My QuitBuddy can help you through the hardest times with helpful tips and distractions to overcome cravings; tracking systems to chart your progress; and all the facts you need to understand the impacts smoking and vaping have on your health.

There is an entire community of buddies there to help you out, with success stories, experiences and handy tips.

Feel good about how much money you’re saving and how much nasty stuff your lungs are avoiding. Over time, watch the savings and results begin to pile up.

All quit journeys are full of ups and downs, depending on how you’re feeling on any given day. On days when your cravings are strong, distractions and soothing imagery are available to help you get through. 

Quitting can be hard and most people try a number of times before they finally quit for good. 

My QuitBuddy is with you every step of the way.

Don’t quit alone. Download the free My QuitBuddy app today. 

Key Features:
'Quit Now', prepare to 'Quit Later' or 'Continue Quitting'.
- Set your goals and understand your motivations to quit.
- Nominate friends or family who you can call in the tough times.
- View your progress, including a count of every day, hour and minute you stay smoke- and vape-free and how much money you've saved.
- For the first 30 days of your journey, you'll receive a helpful tip when you open the app.
- You can nominate any Danger Times and My QuitBuddy will get in touch to keep you on track.
- My QuitBuddy helps with a range of distractions to occupy your mind and your hands through any moments of craving. 
- Read helpful messages from other people who are quitting with My QuitBuddy and leave your own for others to read.
- If you need additional backup, you can call the Quitline directly on 13 7848 (13 QUIT) from the app.

name: Finito: Stop Smoking
description:
Hypnotherapy makes you 10 times more likely to stop smoking for 1+ year than stopping without any support.

If you’ve tried stopping before, you’ll know how hard it is to remain a non-smoker. That’s where Finito comes in. 

Finito is a self-hypnosis program that addresses the underlying reasons that cause you to smoke, providing hypnotic suggestions to the subconscious to manage cravings, emotions, and habits.

Backed by science:

Our breakthrough program is designed by Dr. Gary Elkins, a world-leading neuroscientist and director of the Mind-Body Medicine Research Laboratory at Baylor University.

With Finito, you can:
 
Say goodbye to weak moments
Learn to self-manage cravings symptoms
Address the underlying reasons you smoke
Manage anxious feelings and irritability
Create healthier habits
Stop smoking for good, without relying on pills or patches 

Will it work?

Stop smoking hypnotherapy has been clinically proven to be 10 times more effective than stopping without support. 

Neurobiological brain studies show that hypnotherapy sessions activate areas of the brain associated with attention, sensitivity, motivation, and a positive sense of well-being.

This means that as you listen to positive suggestions given to you through hypnotherapy you are more likely to put these suggestions into action, making long lasting changes to your health and well-being. 

How does it work?

Hypnosis for stop smoking works by reducing stress through a series of relaxing visualizations, and empowering suggestions that will reduce your fear of quitting, and increase your ability to manage cravings. Through daily calming hypnotherapy sessions you can be motivated to stay free from smoking. 

Our team is with you every step of the way, through in-app chat, education, and on-demand stop-craving exercises.

What you get:
 
Evidence-based hypnotherapy program
Relaxing 15-minute daily sessions that fit easily into your schedule 
Supportive reinforcement program to help you maintain results 
Craving Toolkit with short sessions you can use on the go
Cigarette Tracker to record your progress in reducing cigarettes to zero
Daily educational readings with tips for navigating cravings and building new habits
In-app chat support from real people

Take your step forward to a smoke-free life with Finito.


Disclaimer:

This is a self-management tool designed to help people manage their smoking behaviour. It is not designed to treat nicotine addiction. The program does not replace the care of a medical provider or the patient’s medication. Always consult your healthcare professional before making medical decisions.
  
If you subscribe through iTunes, the credit card associated with your iTunes account will automatically renew unless you cancel at least 24 hours before the end of the current payment period. If you do not cancel, your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. 
 
To manage your Finito subscription from iTunes:
1) On your iOS device, go to your device Settings and the 'iTunes & App Stores'
2) Tap on your Apple ID
3) Tap to 'View Apple ID'. (You may need to sign in or use Touch ID.)
4) Tap on 'Subscriptions'
5) Choose Finito Subscription'
6) Tap 'Cancel Subscription'
 
For more information, please see our Terms and Conditions of Use: https://www.mindsethealth.com/legal/finito-privacy-policy, https://www.mindsethealth.com/legal/finito-terms-conditions

References
 
Clinical Hypnosis for Smoking Cessation: Preliminary Results of a Three-Session Intervention (2005) by Gary R Elkins and M. Hasan Rajab
 
Jensen MP, Adachi T, Tomé-Pires C, Lee J, Osman ZJ, Miró J. Mechanisms of hypnosis: toward the development of a biopsychosocial model [published correction appears in Int J Clin Exp Hypn. 2015;63(2):247]. Int J Clin Exp Hypn. 2015;63(1):34-75. doi:10.1080/00207144.2014.961875

name: QuitNow PRO: Stop smoking
description: Have you considered quitting smoking? Whether you’ve already quit or you’re still thinking about it, QuitNow PRO will help you quit tobacco for good. Quitting smoking is one of the best decisions you can make for your health: it reduces your risk of disease, you regain energy, you save money, and you also protect the people around you. But the truth is, quitting smoking isn’t easy. That’s where QuitNow PRO comes in. QuitNow PRO was born in 2011, created by a smoker who wanted to quit. Since then, we’ve grown, brought in addiction specialists, and refined our tools so you can quit tobacco for good: 🗓️ Your ex-smoker status When you quit smoking, it’s important to clearly see what you’re achieving. That’s why on QuitNow PRO’s home screen you’ll see how long it’s been since you last smoked, how many cigarettes you haven’t smoked, how much money you’ve saved, and how much life you’ve regained. 💬 Community: the ex-smokers chat Having a smoke-free environment is crucial when you quit. QuitNow PRO offers a chat full of people who, like you, have said goodbye to tobacco. Sharing your journey with other ex-smokers will make your path easier. 👨‍⚕️ Live sessions with an expert Every month we host a live session with a smoking cessation expert. In these sessions, the psychologist explains the best way to quit smoking and answers attendees’ questions live. These sessions are a unique opportunity to get personalized advice and clear up doubts in real time. 👨‍🏫 A complete course to quit smoking Some people prefer a more structured approach when they quit. That’s why QuitNow PRO includes a step-by-step course designed to guide you throughout the entire process of quitting tobacco. It works like a digital book, but integrated inside the app. 🏆 Milestones: small motivations to quit smoking As with any task in life, quitting smoking is easier when you break the challenge into smaller goals. That’s why QuitNow PRO offers 80 milestones based on the cigarettes you’ve avoided, the days you’ve gone without smoking, and the money you’ve saved. This way, you can start celebrating your wins from day one. 🍎️ Your health as an ex-smoker In QuitNow PRO you’ll find a list of health indicators that show how your body improves day by day. These indicators are the same ones published by the World Health Organization, and we update them as soon as the WHO does. Plus, QuitNow PRO includes other sections designed to help you on your journey to quit smoking. 🤖 QuitNow PRO AI Whenever questions come up during your quitting process, you can turn to QuitNow PRO AI. It’s designed to provide clear, reliable information, based on our course and on data from the World Health Organization. 📚 Books to help you quit smoking Learning techniques and approaches to quit smoking can make the process much easier. That’s why we’ve selected well-known books that can effectively help you on your path to a tobacco-free life. ⌚ Also on your watch QuitNow PRO’s Wear OS app and its tiles let you track your progress, see how much you’ve saved, and check your smoke-free stats right from your wrist. Because we dedicate so much time and effort to it, we firmly believe QuitNow PRO is the best app to quit smoking. As always, there’s room for improvement—so if you have any idea to make QuitNow PRO even better, please write to us at android@quitnow.app. We truly hope QuitNow PRO supports you on your journey to a tobacco-free life ❤️

name: QuitSure Quit Smoking & Vaping
description:
A modern, enjoyable and no-guilt approach to quit smoking.

Quit smoking the easiest way. QuitSure offers 6-day and 6-week programs that removes your desire to smoke - so you quit without cravings, without withdrawal, and without willpower.

You don't have to quit today. You can keep smoking during the entire program and quit only when you're truly ready. No guilt. No pressure.

96% of quit attempts fail - not because you lack willpower, but because most methods fight the wrong battle. QuitSure doesn't ask you to resist cravings. It eliminates them. By the time you reach your quit day, you won't want to smoke anymore.

 -  -  - 

WHY QUITSURE WORKS

QuitSure is built on the science of why you smoke - and uses that science to undo the addiction at its root.

◆ Based on Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), REBT Therapy, and Classical Conditioning
◆ Grounded in principles of psychology, neuroscience, and habit formation
◆ Personalised to your specific smoking triggers
◆ Created by ex-smokers who truly understand what you're going through

No lifestyle overhaul. No self-control battles. No guilt trips. Just a clear, step-by-step path to becoming smoke-free.

 -  -  - 

HOW THE PROGRAM WORKS

The QuitSure program takes about one hour per day over 6 days - roughly 8 to 10 hours total. Each day, you'll read, watch, and listen to content designed to change how your mind thinks about smoking.

◆ Personalised daily sessions tailored to your triggers
◆ Short mental exercises each day (5 to 20 minutes) that dissolve cravings at the source
◆ Step-by-step instructions - just follow the program
◆ Learn why other quit methods fail and why this one doesn't
◆ Understand how nicotine addiction actually works
◆ Prepare for your quit day with proven relapse-prevention tools

You set the pace. The program guides you. And when your quit day arrives, you'll be ready - not because you're forcing yourself, but because the desire is gone.

 -  -  - 

WHAT YOU GET

◆ A complete 6-day quit smoking program
◆ A personal coach to support you
◆ Daily video, audio, and reading content
◆ Quick daily exercises to rewire your cravings

name: QuitNow!
description:
Have you considered quitting smoking? Whether you’ve already stopped smoking or you’re still thinking about it, QuitNow will help you quit tobacco for good.

Quitting smoking is one of the best decisions you can make for your health: it reduces your risk of disease, you regain energy, you save money, and you also protect the people around you. But the truth is, quitting isn’t easy.

That’s where QuitNow comes in.

QuitNow was born in 2011, created by a smoker who wanted to quit. Since then, we’ve grown, brought in addiction specialists, and refined our tools so you can quit tobacco for good:

YOUR EX-SMOKER STATUS
When you stop smoking, it’s important to clearly see what you’re achieving. That’s why on QuitNow’s home screen you’ll see how long it’s been since you last smoked, how many cigarettes you haven’t smoked, how much money you’ve saved, and how much life you’ve regained.

COMMUNITY: THE EX-SMOKERS’ CHAT
Having a smoke-free environment is crucial when you quit. QuitNow offers a chat full of people who, like you, have said goodbye to tobacco. Sharing your journey with other ex-smokers will make your path easier.

LIVE SESSIONS WITH AN EXPERT
Every month we host a live session with a smoking cessation expert. In these sessions, the psychologist explains the best way to stop smoking and answers attendees’ questions live. These sessions are a unique opportunity to get personalised advice and resolve doubts in real time.

A COMPLETE COURSE TO QUIT SMOKING
Some people prefer a more structured method when they quit. That’s why QuitNow includes a step-by-step course designed to guide you throughout the entire quitting process. It works like a digital book, but integrated inside the app.

MILESTONES: SMALL MOTIVATIONS TO QUIT SMOKING
As with any task in life, quitting is easier when you break the challenge into smaller goals. That’s why QuitNow offers 80 milestones based on the cigarettes you’ve avoided, the days you’ve gone without smoking, and the money you’ve saved. This way, you can start celebrating your wins from day one.

YOUR HEALTH AS AN EX-SMOKER
In QuitNow you’ll find a list of health indicators that show how your body improves day by day. These indicators are the same ones published by the World Health Organization, and we update them as soon as the WHO does.

Plus, QuitNow includes other sections designed to help you on your journey to stop smoking.

QUITNOW AI
Whenever questions come up during your quitting process, you can turn to QuitNow AI. It’s designed to provide clear, reliable information, based on our course and on data from the World Health Organization.

BOOKS TO HELP YOU QUIT SMOKING
Learning techniques and approaches to quit can make the process much easier. That’s why we’ve selected well-known books that can effectively help you on your path to a tobacco-free life.

ALSO ON YOUR WATCH
QuitNow’s Apple Watch app and its widgets and tiles let you track your progress, see how much you’ve saved, and check your smoke-free stats right from your wrist.

Because we dedicate so much time and effort to it, we firmly believe QuitNow is the best app to quit smoking. As always, there’s room for improvement—so if you have any idea to make QuitNow even better, please write to us at ios@quitnow.app.

We truly hope QuitNow supports you on your journey to a tobacco-free life.

Privacy Policy: https://tos.quitnow.app/privacypolicy

name: Quit Smoking --~ Smoke Free
description:
This app was developed by former smokers based on the experiences of many other former smokers and has already helped millions of users quit smoking. How can it help you?

In the beginning there is your decision. Let's not fool ourselves. If you are not serious, it will be difficult. But if you really want it, your chances are good that you will make it with the help of this app.

There are many different strategies, methods, and tools that can help you quit. Whether one thing or the other works better for you can vary from person to person, but the experiences of millions of former smokers show that it is almost always a mixture of information, motivation and participation that ultimately led to success.

Therefore, this app relies on a selection of tried and tested methods and tools, which are based on the three strategic pillars of information, motivation and participation.


What tools does this app offer?

Numbers::
Keep track of the most important numbers: number of days as a non-smoker, number of cigarettes not smoked, money saved.

Health:
Review your health progress and your physical reactions to not smoking.

Knowledge:
Carefully researched and comprehensive knowledge, context and advice on every aspect of smoking will ensure that your decision to quit is strengthened, that you remain motivated and are as well prepared as possible for withdrawal.

Tasks:
During the particularly difficult initial period of quitting, you will be given small tasks every day, aimed at reflecting on the knowledge you have learned, convincing you of your decision, and keeping motivation high.

Cravings Help:
If you want to have a cigarette, you will be shown practical solutions for the respective situations in which you are currently in. Statistics also show you in which situations you are most often at risk, so that you can avoid them or approach them differently in the future.

Top 10 Tips:
Get valuable advice from former smokers about what helped them the most to quit smoking. Since they speak from experience, there's a good chance that there's something there that will be a great help to you too.

Awards:
You regularly receive awards for milestones achieved on your way to becoming a non-smoker, which you can share with family and friends.

Savings goals:
Set savings goals and watch getting closer and closer to them becasue of the money you save.

100 reasons:
If you have a strong cigarette craving, 100 reasons to not smoke a cigarette will help you.

Apple Watch App:
The Apple Watch app quickly shows you the most important numbers of your non-smoking career.

Widget:
The widget quickly shows you the most important numbers of your non-smoking career.

name: I Am Sober
description:
I Am Sober is more than just a free sobriety counter app.

Along with tracking your sober days, it helps you build new habits and provides ongoing motivation by connecting you to a wide network of people all striving for the same goal: staying sober one day at a time.

Through our growing sober community you can learn from others and contribute by sharing insights and tactics that have worked for you.

**The I Am Sober app features:**

• Sober day tracker
To visualize how long you’ve been sober.

• Remember why you quit
Add reasons and photos to help you remember why you want to quit your addiction and stay sober.

• Daily pledge tracker
Take a pledge every day. Sobriety is a 24-hour struggle, so start your day off by making a pledge to stay sober. Then you can review how your day went and log notes at the end of the day.

• Sobriety calculator
View how much money & time you’ve saved by being sober.

• Analyze triggers
Recap each day and find patterns that made your day easier or more challenging than the last.

• Share your story
Either with others or for yourself, take photos and journal your progress directly in the app. Then choose to share it or save it as a reminder for yourself.

• Milestone tracker
Track and celebrate your milestones from 1 day, to 1 week, to 1 month and beyond. Compare experiences with others on their sober journey. Read how they felt at this milestone and what you can expect. If you’re struggling, share your story and invite others to offer help or advice.

• Withdrawal timeline
When you create an account and declare your addiction, you can instantly see a withdrawal timeline to get an idea of what to expect for your next few days (and weeks). What’s more, you can contribute to it. See how many others saw an increase in their restfulness vs those that saw an increase in anxiety. Prepare yourself for what’s to come in recovery.

• Customize your experience
You set the time, your sober birthday, the category of motivation you need, the addictions you’re trying to break, even the end-of-day summaries. Make the app customized to your lifestyle and tailored to your needs.

**Sober Plus subscriptions**

I Am Sober is free to use, but you can support development of the app with a subscription to Sober Plus. With Sober Plus, you'll get access to these premium features:

• Create a group
Stay accountable together and track your sobriety privately. Groups are great for complimenting your real-world group like Alcoholics Anonymous, NA, SA, SMART Recovery, or your rehab center.

• Locked access
Keep your trackers private with a lock that you can access via TouchID or FaceID.

• Data Backups
Save your progress in the cloud and restore your trackers if you get a new device.

• More tracking
Track more addictions and get access to more communities. Even if your addiction is specific like Wine, Online Shopping, or Skin Picking, you’ll find a variety of communities of people who are all trying to get sober from alcohol, drugs, eating disorders, self-harm, and more.

Payment will be charged to iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase. I Am Sober Plus automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period. - Hoeveel pakjes waren dat wel niet

name: Quit Smoking Gradually: Alive
description:
Quit smoking at your own pace. Alive helps you make it happen.

Tired of cigarettes controlling your life? Alive helps you take back control without the pressure of quitting cold turkey. With a personalized plan and a simple smoking tracker, you can gradually quit smoking, ease withdrawals, and reduce anxiety without pressure.

Unlike other apps, Alive doesn’t expect you to be smoke-free on day one. Whether you’re considering quitting, struggling with it, or adjusting to life without cigarettes, Alive supports you every step of the way.

You’re in charge. Track your progress, take it slow, pause anytime, and come back when you’re ready. No pressure, no guilt. And when you’re ready to stop smoking for good, Alive supports you with tracking tools, guidance, and gentle reminders—especially when things get tough.

Ready to break free? Alive has your back—every step of the way. Download now and begin your journey to a smoke-free life today!  

Why Choose Alive to Quit Smoking?

Alive isn’t just about breaking free from cigarettes—it’s about celebrating every win along the way. The app helps your body gradually adapt to less nicotine, easing dependence and minimizing withdrawal, making your smoke-free journey smoother.

Here’s How Alive Helps: 

• Track Stats & Milestones: See detailed statistics on how far you've come in real time, from cigarettes avoided to money saved. Track exactly how much you’re gaining by cutting back.  

• Track Cigarette Reduction: Record your smoking patterns, progress, and reduction using our cigarette log and smoking tracker as you gradually work to stop smoking.  

• Save Money: Cutting back helps your health and wallet. Track the money you’re saving with every cigarette you choose to skip.  

• Monitor Withdrawals: Receive support through encouraging notifications and smart reminders, along with practical tips to manage anxiety and stay strong through cravings as you cut back.  

How Does Alive Work?

1. Start by entering your smoking habits.  

2. Log each cigarette with the smoking tracker. Sometimes, the waiting timer will gently ask you to pause a few minutes, helping you delay urges and build discipline.  

3. Follow your personalized plan in weekly phases, gradually increasing time between cigarettes to help your body adapt to less nicotine while tracking withdrawals.  

4. Track your progress & milestones. At the end of each week, you can choose to advance or stay in the current phase, giving you control to quit at your own pace.  

Additionally, our Quit Smoking Savings Calculator helps you track how much money you save as you gradually reduce smoking, so you feel good in your body and your bank account.  

Support After Quitting

Quitting is just the beginning. Alive stays with you every step of the way. Use the smoking tracker and cigarette log to reflect on how far you’ve come. Dive into our app for quit smoking tips, daily encouragement, and practical motivation to help you stay strong, stay smoke-free, and live the life you deserve.  

Download Alive now and start your journey to quit smoking today.  

Subscription & Pricing Policy  

Alive is free for the first week. Choose a subscription plan that fits your budget—it’s an investment in your health with big rewards.

Consult your doctor—this app is a helpful tool, not a medical treatment. Ultimately, the final step is yours: that last cigarette and your commitment. Remember: one step is always easier than a giant leap.

Track your health improvements, the money you’ve saved by quitting, and even how much your life expectancy has increased—all in real-time.

■ Collect badges to increase your chances of success
Beyond just tracking your smoke-free time, challenge yourself to collect badges to stay motivated. These small milestones can make a big difference in your success.

--

▶ Recommended for

- Those seeking extra motivation to quit smoking
- People who want to raise awareness about the risks of smoking
- Anyone looking to make quitting more fun and engaging
- Those who struggle with cravings after meals or in the morning
- Anyone who wants a simple way to track their smoke-free progress

▶ Tips for Successfully Quitting Smoking with Stop Smoking

1. Letting people around you know you’re quitting increases your chances of success. Use the share button at the top to spread the word.
2. When you experience withdrawal symptoms, check the app for guidance and use the 4D strategy to cope.
3. Read the daily motivational quotes aloud to stay inspired.
4. Regularly review your quit time and reflect on how far you’ve come.
5. As you succeed each day, write down why quitting smoking is important to you, and collect badges for extra motivation.

▶ Amazing Benefits of Quitting Smoking

1. Improved breathing: After quitting, your lung function will improve, making it easier to breathe.
2. Better skin: Quitting smoking clears up your skin and can slow down aging.
3. Heart health: Quitting reduces the risk of heart disease and helps stabilize your blood pressure.
4. Longer life expectancy: A smoke-free life means a longer, healthier life with more time to enjoy.
5.Financial savings: Save the money you used to spend on cigarettes and enjoy more financial freedom.

Quitting smoking benefits not only your health but also your finances and relationships. You’ll save money, spend more time with loved ones, and reduce the risk of smoking-related illnesses, allowing you to lead a healthier, more vibrant life.

Start your quit journey today and take the first step toward a better future. Use the Stop Smoking app to maximize the benefits of quitting and make it your essential tool for success.

name: Stop Vaping Challenge
description:
Thinking about quitting vaping, but not sure where to start? Why not try the Stop Vaping Challenge?

It’s very simple:
1. Start the Challenge Timer.
2. Go for as long as you can without vaping.
3. Check in regularly by entering Mood and Cravings information and recording photo and video diary entries in Memory. 
4. If you vape one day, don’t forget to end the Challenge Timer. More importantly, start again! Trying as many times as you can is important.
5. Make it more fun by earning badges and challenging your friends!

Stop Vaping Challenge is part of a research study at the Dalla School of Public Health at the University of Toronto. By downloading this app and consenting to use it, you are helping researchers and clinicians better understand the process of quitting vaping.

For more information, visit the study page: https://www.otru.org/studies/quitvapestudy.html

Whether you are in the first hour of your journey or celebrating years of success, our platform delivers the precise metrics you need to stay committed to your goals.

AI-Powered Recovery Assistance

In moments of high stress or intense cravings, the AI delivers scientifically backed intervention techniques, including structured box breathing exercises and hydration protocols, to help you navigate through triggers without relapsing.

Dynamic Health Metric Monitoring 
Experience the science of healing. Our health dashboard tracks your body’s physiological recovery in real-time. Monitor critical milestones such as:

	•	Carbon Monoxide (CO2) clearance from the bloodstream.
	•	Restoration of blood oxygen levels.
	•	Improvements in circulation and heart disease risk reduction.
	•	Gradual clearing of lung tissue and respiratory function recovery.

Financial Intelligence & Savings Tracking
Smoking is a significant financial burden. Our advanced calculator quantifies your success by tracking exactly how much capital you have reclaimed. By inputting your previous habits and local currency costs, you can watch your total savings accumulate daily, providing a tangible reward for your discipline.

Smart Relapse Analysis 
Honesty is the foundation of recovery. If a slip-up occurs, the "I Smoked" logger allows you to record the event. Unlike basic timers that simply reset to zero, our smart logic applies a calculated health penalty to your lung damage percentage based on your progress. This provides a realistic view of how a relapse affects your long-term healing while encouraging you to restart immediately.

Key Analytical Features:

	•	Life Regained Counter: An actuarial estimate of the time added back to your lifespan based on cigarettes avoided.


	•	Cumulative Statistics Bank: A permanent record of total money saved and total cigarettes avoided across your entire journey.

	•	Streak Management: Automated tracking of your current and longest smoke-free periods to foster consistency.

	•	Personalized Profile: Custom configuration based on your age, gender, and historical nicotine consumption for 100% accurate data.

Professional Interface 
We prioritize your focus. The application features a clean, professional, and ad-free interface designed to present your data without distractions. Your progress is the only priority.

Important Medical Note: 
This application is for informational and motivational purposes only. It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of a physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition or smoking cessation program.

name: WHO QuitTobacco
description:
Welcome to WHO QuitTobacco, your dedicated partner on the journey to a tobacco-free life. We understand that quitting tobacco, a habit encompassing Cigarette Smoking and/or Smokeless Tobacco use, is a significant personal challenge. We're here to provide you with the guidance, motivation, and support you need to overcome this Addiction.

App Features:

* Health Improvement Tracker: Bid farewell to smoking and smokeless tobacco for improved lung function, increased energy, and reduced health risks. Use our Health Improvement Tracker to monitor your progress and see the positive impact of your tobacco-free choices on well-being

* Cost Savings Calculator: Ever wondered how much money you spend on Tobacco? With our Cost Savings Calculator, you can now quantify your daily, monthly, and yearly expenses related to Cigarette Addiction. Watch your savings accumulate as you choose to embrace a smoke-free life, providing you with a compelling financial incentive to stay on the path to quitting.

* Personal Quit Plan: Set your personal challenges that may be make it difficult for you to quit using tobacco and how you plan to overcome those challenges and identify your personal triggers, and establish effective strategies to conquer Cravings. This plan empowers you to take control of your journey with a personalized approach

* Motivation Journal: Motivation is the cornerstone of a successful quit tobacco journey. In our Motivation Journal, you can document your personal reasons for quitting Smoking and breaking the Habit of Cigarettes. By reflecting on these motivators, you'll discover a wellspring of inspiration to carry you through the inevitable challenges. Let your motivators be your guiding light on this transformative journey towards a tobacco-free life. 

* Link Supporters: You don't have to face this challenge alone. Invite your friends, family, and supporters to join you on your quest to quit smoking and smokeless tobacco. Share your progress, celebrate your successes, and receive encouragement from those who genuinely care about your well-being. Together, you can achieve your goal of becoming smoke-free.

* Craving Diary: Keeping a diary always helps to track your progress with cravings. Managing Cravings is a pivotal aspect of quitting Smoking and Cigarettes. With our Craving Diary, you can keep a detailed record of your cravings, providing you with insight into their patterns and triggers. Each entry serves as a testament to your growing strength and determination as you successfully overcome Cravings, one at a time.

* Cravings Management: This section helps you to see where your cravings happen and the feelings, situations or people who trigger them. This helps you manage and prepare for the next one. We provide you with the tools and resources to effectively manage and conquer Cravings in real-time. Approach every craving with confidence, knowing you have the resources at your fingertips to stay tobacco-free.

* Personal Challenges: Identify the personal challenges that may arise during your journey to quit Tobacco. Develop coping strategies tailored to your unique circumstances and create a roadmap for making your environment tobacco-free. WHO QuitTobacco is your trusted guide to adopting a tobacco-free lifestyle that aligns with your goals and values.

Conclusion:

WHO QuitTobacco is more than just an app; it's your unwavering partner in embracing a tobacco and nicotine free life. Join the millions who have successfully quit smoking and smokeless tobacco with our support. Say goodbye to Cigarettes, reclaim your health, and embark on a transformative journey towards a tobacco-free future. Download the app now and take the first step towards a life filled with health, vitality, and the satisfaction of conquering one of life's toughest challenges.

SmoX tracks your journey in real time — days without smoking, cigarettes avoided, packs skipped, and money saved. 
Watch your body heal step by step as blood oxygen, smell, taste, and immunity recover. 
When cravings hit, our tips help you push through.

name: quitSTART - Quit Smoking
description:
quitSTART is a free app made for people who want to quit smoking. This app takes the information you provide about your smoking history and gives you tailored tips, inspiration, and challenges to help you become smokefree and live a healthier life.

quitSTART helps you: 
• Get ready to quit with tips and information to prepare you for becoming smokefree
• Monitor your progress and earn badges for smokefree milestones and other achievements 
• Get back on track if you slip and smoke
• Manage cravings and bad moods in healthy ways
• Distract yourself from cravings with games and challenges
• Store helpful tips, inspirations, and challenges in your Quit Kit
• Share your progress and favorite tips through social media

quitSTART is a product of Smokefree.gov, a smoking cessation resource created by the Tobacco Control Research Branch at the National Cancer Institute in collaboration with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration and input from tobacco control professionals, smoking cessation experts, and ex-smokers.

name: Alok - Quit Tobacco
description:
Take the first step toward a tobacco-free life with your personal AI coach, designed to help you quit tobacco in India. Our 14-step program, based on Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), guides you through the process in a conversational and supportive way. Your AI coach is available in English, Hindi, Bengali, Marathi, Telugu, and Tamil, so you can get personalized help in your preferred language.

Set your quit date early, follow the daily steps, and stay on track with friendly follow-up. Whether you’re using cigarettes, bidis, gutkha, or other tobacco products, your AI coach will guide you to quit for good.

Download today, set your goal, and begin your journey to a healthier life—one day at a time.

–––––––

name: Quit Smoking App
developer: Tobacco Control Office, Department of Health
description:
Together, we can create a smoke-free Hong Kong. The Tobacco and Alcohol Control Office of the Department of Health is launching this Quit Smoking App to assist smokers to overcome tobacco dependence.

For Smokers
You can assess your nicotine dependence level, set the quit plan, record your quitting progress in the app. You can also read the health information and tips relating to quitting to help you stay tobacco-free. 

For Non-smokers
You can recommend your family and friends to use the app and encourage them to quit smoking.
